assessment.note: He confirms reduced participation in team rituals, which is a strong engagement dip with a mild wellbeing drag.

new_queue.label: Less present rituals
new_queue.name: When you say 'less present in rituals' — what has shifted there specifically?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the concrete change in his participation before moving the arc forward.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: What landed
new_queue.name: What did you take from the promotion decision?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the meaning James assigned to the outcome and whether the message was clear or muddled.

new_queue.label: Under the surface
new_queue.name: What's been harder to put into words about work lately?
new_queue.description: Gives James room to name whatever is underneath the visible shift without forcing a diagnosis.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation toward immediate support and practical stabilizers.
